goal: 对齐本地 lint 与 GitHub CI

summary.title: Local lint target runs the pinned CI golangci-lint
summary.what: Updated Makefile lint so it no longer skips golangci-lint when a local binary is missing. The target now runs golangci-lint v1.62.2 through go run, matching the GitHub CI action version, then runs go vet.
summary.why: The PR previously passed local build/test checks while failing GitHub lint because local make lint could silently skip golangci-lint. The local lint target should exercise the same pinned linter contract CI enforces.
summary.user_goal: 最小路径修复本地和 CI lint 不一致的问题

decisions.rationale: This avoids requiring a preinstalled local binary and keeps the default version aligned with GitHub CI.

decisions.chose: Only update the lint target instead of redesigning the full local CI pipeline.
decisions.rationale: The observed failure was missing golangci-lint parity; quick-test and full CI targets can stay as existing workflow layers.

rejected.alternative: Keep skipping golangci-lint when the binary is absent
rejected.reason: That recreates the exact local/CI mismatch that let the gocritic failure through.

rejected.alternative: Require developers to install golangci-lint manually
rejected.reason: Manual installation is easy to forget and may still drift from the CI-pinned version.

risks: The first local make lint run may be slower while go run downloads and builds golangci-lint v1.62.2, but subsequent runs use the Go cache.
The golangci-lint version is now duplicated in Makefile and GitHub workflow; future CI version bumps should update both together.

anti_patterns.what: Allowing make lint to skip golangci-lint silently when the binary is missing
anti_patterns.why: GitHub CI always runs the pinned golangci-lint gate, so skipping it locally gives false confidence before push.

followups: Consider a future ci-local target only if contributors need one command that mirrors the full GitHub build matrix.

behavioral_changes: make lint now runs golangci-lint v1.62.2 even when no local golangci-lint binary is installed
make lint still runs go vet after golangci-lint
migration_notes: Developers can override GOLANGCI_LINT or GOLANGCI_LINT_VERSION if needed, but the default matches GitHub CI.
